news-global-econ.title: Ambani-backed robot start-up seeks $100 million to take on China
news-global-econ.description: The start-up faces much bigger rivals from countries such as China, Japan, and the US, yet Chief Executive Officer Sangeet Kumar says there’s room for an Indian contender in the rapidly developing industry

news-global-econ.title: Top GOP target Dina Titus fends off House primary challengers
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Dina Titus wins the Democratic primary in Nevada's 1st Congressional District, defeating three challengers to secure her eighth term nomination.

news-global-econ.title: Collins secures GOP nod in Maine Senate battle that could decide GOP majority
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Susan Collins wins Maine GOP primary unopposed as she seeks a sixth term, facing Democrat Graham Platner in a crucial Senate majority battle.

news-global-econ.title: Trump administration to offer 'premium' expedited visa interviews for $750
news-global-econ.description: The State Department will unveil a $750 premium service allowing foreigners seeking U.S. business or tourist visas to schedule interviews within 10 days of payment.

news-global-econ.title: LA Hotels hit by largest job losses in a decade as 'Olympic Wage' mandates bite, data shows
news-global-econ.description: Los Angeles hotel industry job losses hit their worst rate in a decade outside of COVID, the Employment Policies Institute reports, as the city's minimum wage mandate took effect.

news-global-soc.title: USMNT legend Landon Donovan talks World Cup, American soccer's influence overseas during Raising Cane's shift
news-global-soc.description: Landon Donovan reflects on how American soccer earned global respect as the 2026 FIFA World Cup approaches at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles area.

news-global-soc.title: Breitbart Business Digest: Trade Data Shows Trump's Tariffs Are Working
news-global-soc.description:
The best kept secret in American politics and economics right now is that Trump's tariffs are working to reduce the trade deficit.

news-global-soc.title: Pro wrestler Joe Coffey says he felt his last few years were 'kinda wasted,' looks forward to growth with MLW
news-global-soc.description: Joe Coffey explains approach with Major League Wrestling, saying he felt wasted and wants more character development with his stablemates.
